acquisitionStrategySummary: Cisco has historically used acquisitions to expand into new markets, especially switching, optical networking, collaboration, security, observability, cloud networking and AI infrastructure.

majorAcquisitions.name: Splunk
majorAcquisitions.summary: Cisco's largest acquisition. It materially expands Cisco into security, observability, machine data and AI-era infrastructure.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Can Splunk change Cisco's growth profile and valuation multiple?

majorAcquisitions.name: WebEx
majorAcquisitions.summary: Gave Cisco a major position in web conferencing and collaboration.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Did WebEx give Cisco a lasting collaboration platform advantage?

majorAcquisitions.name: Tandberg
majorAcquisitions.summary: Expanded Cisco's video conferencing and telepresence capabilities.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Did Tandberg strengthen Cisco collaboration enough to justify the price?

majorAcquisitions.name: Meraki
majorAcquisitions.summary: Brought cloud-managed networking into Cisco and became one of its strongest modern networking platforms.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Is Meraki one of Cisco's best acquisitions?

majorAcquisitions.name: OpenDNS
majorAcquisitions.summary: Strengthened Cisco's cloud security and DNS-layer protection capabilities.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Did OpenDNS help Cisco become more credible in cloud-delivered security?

majorAcquisitions.name: AppDynamics
majorAcquisitions.summary: Gave Cisco a major application performance monitoring platform shortly before AppDynamics was expected to IPO.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Has AppDynamics become more valuable as part of Cisco plus Splunk observability?

majorAcquisitions.name: Duo Security
majorAcquisitions.summary: Expanded Cisco's zero-trust and identity security capabilities.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Did Duo materially improve Cisco's security portfolio?

majorAcquisitions.name: Acacia Communications
majorAcquisitions.summary: Strengthened Cisco's optical networking technology for high-speed data movement.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Does Acacia become more important in an AI data centre networking world?

majorAcquisitions.name: ThousandEyes
majorAcquisitions.summary: Added internet and network visibility capabilities that fit well with Cisco networking and observability.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Did ThousandEyes help Cisco explain and monitor the internet more effectively?

majorAcquisitions.name: Jasper
majorAcquisitions.summary: Expanded Cisco's Internet of Things platform capability.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Did Jasper deliver enough IoT growth to justify the acquisition?

majorAcquisitions.name: Sourcefire
majorAcquisitions.summary: Strengthened Cisco's security portfolio with intrusion prevention and threat detection capability.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Was Sourcefire the foundation for Cisco's modern security expansion?

majorAcquisitions.name: Scientific Atlanta
majorAcquisitions.summary: Moved Cisco deeper into video and cable infrastructure, but the long-term strategic value became less clear as markets shifted.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Was Scientific Atlanta a major strategic detour?

majorAcquisitions.name: Cerent
majorAcquisitions.summary: Expanded Cisco aggressively into optical networking during the internet infrastructure boom.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Was Cerent brilliant timing or dot-com era overpayment?

majorAcquisitions.name: StrataCom
majorAcquisitions.summary: Helped Cisco expand beyond routing into switching and wide-area networking.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Was StrataCom one of the acquisitions that made Cisco dominant?

majorAcquisitions.name: Isovalent
majorAcquisitions.summary: Strengthened Cisco's cloud native networking and security position.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Does Isovalent help Cisco compete in Kubernetes-era networking?

majorAcquisitions.name: Galileo Technologies
majorAcquisitions.summary: Cisco announced its intent to acquire Galileo to strengthen AI observability and trust capabilities around Splunk.
majorAcquisitions.impactQuestion: Does Galileo make Splunk more relevant in the agentic AI era?
